query: SELECT id, fen, moves, rating, themes FROM puzzles WHERE fen = 'r2qk2r/pp2n1bp/n2b2p1/2p1p3/2P5/3bq1pP/PP3PP1/R2QK2R w KQkq - 0 1' LIMIT 5;
